reviews.review_description:
Video review here: https://youtu.be/7XDzKjcesRQ

You know a game is effective when it actually makes the hairs on your arms stand up on edge...

I feel like the game is a great concept. I would love to see a more difficult mode as I beat it on my 2nd try. My first try I couldn't look at controls. So I died. All I did was spray thing for 1 fraction of a second and they died. Maybe add in so objective so there's a challenge
Based on the reviews it seems like a good game, but the music is so scary and I am too scared to even start the game😭😭😭😢🙁😭😭😢😢😩😭😭😭😖😢☹️🥺😩🥺😣😖😢☹️🙁😣😖😭😢🥺😩🥺😭😣😭😣😖😫😣😢😖😢😣😖😖😢😣😭😩😖

I was in a room with the car and I was pinned and my lighter went out and I got on the ground in real life and screamed my lungs out all I heard was the Spiders hissing then I got off 10/10 would recommend
If you can’t play it with spiders then they have a mode where it’s cats (I can’t do spider mode, they are icky)

reviews.review_title: This Is A Truly TERRIFYING EXPERIENCE!
reviews.review_description:
This game, and I can’t sweat it enough, is by far one of the most amazing, and horrifying experiences I’ve ever played!
Wile it may not seem like much it is truly immersive, and will have you screaming bloody murder by the end! 
And I truly puts out the question 
“What lies in the dark?”
Goosebumps… 
Chills…
Told from the eyes of a fearful child..
Sheer classic horror…

10/10 
The best horror experience on SideQuest!

Also if you ever wanted voice acting just contact me!
😁👍
brittonturton@icloud.com

-Britton 
         Turton
Great game for oculus quest beginners, but gets boring fast
Bad game not scary 😂 it was funny
I haven’t even played it yet cuz I am scared to death
This game is so scary  😨  to play
You don't even have to move to beat it. Just clicking the shoot button for a second is enough to kill the spider immediately. But the ambient noises are scary. Maybe give the spiders more health?
